headline: Result, shared-trip, and My Trips surfaces now make the save-and-return loop much more explicit.
notes: The result page loop now shows a fuller atlas → guide → sample → planner → My Trips → result path, so saving and returning no longer feels implicit.
Shared trip banners now emphasize moving a shared link into My Trips, with a clearer stage-based flow before branching back into city reading.
My Trips now frames saved routes more explicitly as a city-first continuation loop, not just a storage list, with faster same-city and next-city actions.
Compact loop stage cards were added for result, shared spotlight, and My Trips so the product flow reads more clearly on mobile.
